title: CcdcSliceRecipe
description:
Extract a temporal slice from a CCDC model at a specific date — synthetic imagery from harmonic coefficients of whichever segment covers the date.

Pipeline: load CCDC source (recipe or asset, contains per-pixel break dates + segment coefficients) → for `date.date`, pick segment containing it per-pixel → if none, apply `options.gapStrategy` → render synthetic bands from intercept + slope + harmonics.

**LLM must set:** `source.{type, id}` (which CCDC to slice — no default) and `date.date`. Rest have defaults.

date.description: Target slice date. Per-pixel, the segment containing this date is selected.

source.title: CcdcSliceSource
source.description: SEPAL CCDC recipe id or EE asset id of a CCDC export.

harmonics.description: Harmonics to render. 0 = linear only (intercept + slope); up to 3 adds annual/biannual/triannual. Default 3.

gapStrategy.description: Pixel has no segment covering date: INTERPOLATE (default) = blend closest before/after; EXTRAPOLATE = project from `extrapolateSegment` out to `extrapolateMaxDays`; MASK = leave unmasked.

extrapolateSegment.description: Which neighbor to extrapolate from when `gapStrategy=EXTRAPOLATE`.

extrapolateMaxDays.description: Max days beyond closest segment endpoint. Default 30.

skipBreakInLastSegment.description: Suppress break detection in last segment (avoids spurious end-of-series breaks).
